name: Template: Customer Onboarding

parameters.name: =Onboarding: {{ $json.companyName }}
parameters.notes: =New {{ $json.plan }} customer signed up. Complete onboarding checklist.

parameters.subject: =Welcome to [Product]! Let's get you started 🚀
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.customerName }},

Welcome to [Product]! We're thrilled to have {{ $json.companyName }} on board.

Here's what happens next:

1. ✅ Your account is set up
2. 📅 Schedule your onboarding call: [Calendly Link]
3. 📚 Check out our getting started guide: [Link]
4. 💬 Join our community Slack: [Link]

Questions? Just reply to this email.

Cheers,
[Your Success Team]

parameters.description: =Check in with {{ $json.customerName }} ({{ $json.customerEmail }}) to see how their first month went.

description: Automated customer onboarding: task creation, welcome email, and follow-up scheduling
